thig6.6:1.4: and many other people from suffering!
thig6.6:3.1: Before I was mother, son, father, brother,
thig6.6:3.3: Not knowing things as they were,
thig6.6:4.1: But now that I’ve seen the Blessed One,
thig6.6:4.4: There is now no further becoming.
thig6.6:5.4: This is the worship of the Buddhas.
thig6.6:6.1: Truly for the benefit of the many
thig6.6:6.2: did Māyā give birth to Gotama,
thig6.6:6.3: thrusting away the mass of pain
thig6.6:6.4: of those mired in illness & death.
